page_metadata.biotools__summary: FRETraj is a Python module for predicting FRET efficiencies by calculating multiple accessible-contact volumes (multi-ACV) to estimate donor and acceptor dye dynamics.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FRETraj is a Python module for predicting FRET efficiencies by calculating multiple accessible-contact volumes (multi-ACV) to estimate donor and acceptor dye dynamics.
